programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on lesser-known unbelievable stories about fantastic animals, like a warrior bear that helped the Allies win WWII, and real-life hobbit-like humans in Indonesia.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Daksineshwar - Legends of Kali
programme.desc: The filmmaker focuses on the rich mythology of the prominent Hindu Goddess Kali and the history of one of the most famous temples dedicated to her in Dakshineswar, Kolkata, India.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day. Meanwhile, Todd and Tamera realise that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Darrell helps Kimber with her new botique, Kenny remains confident in his plan in Stanton, California. Realising her need for a distraction, Rene brings Casey along.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa returns to Moreno Valley, where it all started and gets nostalgic with her locker. Meanwhile, Kenny welcomes a new granddaughter to the clan.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry takes on a new disciple and Lisa gets clinical with her find, forcing her to take a closer look. Meanwhile, the new guy pays heavily for a unit.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Alana explores her hometown of Mildura before taking a trip to Vienna, Austria. Meanwhile, Scotty learns about the pearl industry in Broome.

programme.title: Meenakshi Amman - The Marvel of Madurai
programme.desc: The filmmaker celebrates the legend of Meenakshi Amman, a goddess, queen and patron deity of the archaic city of Madurai.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Celebrate India's uniqueness with stories of innovation, odd talents, and amazing feats. Each episode uncovers the extraordinary that exists quietly across every Indian corner.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A shipment of medical equipment takes a weird turn when Jenn learns that her load is a lot more different than expected.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Darrell helps Kimber with her new botique, Kenny remains confident in his plan in Stanton, California. Realising her need for a distraction, Rene brings Casey along.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa returns to Moreno Valley, where it all started and gets nostalgic with her locker. Meanwhile, Kenny welcomes a new granddaughter to the clan.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry takes on a new disciple and Lisa gets clinical with her find, forcing her to take a closer look. Meanwhile, the new guy pays heavily for a unit.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Explore a bizarre tractor race in Punjab, an extraordinarily large thali no one has ever managed to finish and a man from Kerala who is fond of letting thousands of bees sit on his face.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Firepower: Defending India
programme.desc: Take a look at how Indian troops brave icy weathers of the Siachen Glacier and how the Medical Corps evacuates an injured soldier.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny inspects a collection featuring a 1993 Ford Roadster and 1953 Henry J. Later, Kevin, Ryan and Mike experience the strain of proving their unauthorized purchase's worth.

credits.actor: Danny Koker

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: The Einstein Challenge
programme.desc: Subject-matter experts Mike Nelson and Matthew Cappucci explain various weather events like the formation of sinkholes, thundersnow and the supercell tornado.

programme.title: Food Tech
programme.desc: Delving deep into the culture and making of pasta, the host forages the various ingredients required to prepare the delicious Italian dish.

credits.actor: Bobby Bognar

programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: The documentarian tells the story of the most successful pizza franchise on the planet, which includes drones, muscle cars and a lot of dough.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths face a cleaver challenge with meat hook steel, while two finalists forge a formidable Maguro Bocho tuna knife for the win.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host sheds light on Indian culture by travelling across the country to explore food, rituals, traditions and some rare talents.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: While Darrell helps Kimber with her new botique, Kenny remains confident in his plan in Stanton, California. Realising her need for a distraction, Rene brings Casey along.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Dee Snider seeks Danny's expertise to transform his Tesla into a rocker's dream ride. Meanwhile, Danny and Davey eye a classic Monte Carlo, hoping to add it to their collection.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Meenakshi Amman - The Marvel of Madurai
programme.desc: The filmmaker celebrates the legend of Meenakshi Amman, a goddess, queen and patron deity of the archaic city of Madurai.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Celebrate India's uniqueness with stories of innovation, odd talents, and amazing feats. Each episode uncovers the extraordinary that exists quietly across every Indian corner.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: During one of the most perilous times in history, a small group of Jews dared an escape from one of the camps in Sobibor to share their truth with the world.

credits.actor: Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi is fired up about expanding her brand in San Bernardino. Later, Rene is positive that everyone is out to get him and Dusty tackles a locker dustier than him.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and his son discover a locker containing mysterious sports gear. Meanwhile, Rene's assertiveness leads to a satisfying victory, refusing to be exploited.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: At Clay Spencer Blacksmith shop, three skilled smiths face off in a heated competition. Subsequently, through gruelling challenges, they showcase their mastery of the forge.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: At Clay Spencer Blacksmith shop, three skilled smiths face off in a heated competition. Subsequently, through gruelling challenges, they showcase their mastery of the forge.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: With the help of various pieces of evidence, experts try to figure out whether extraterrestrials are able to alter human DNA and repopulate Earth.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz meet an eccentric prince who only answers to an otherworldly authority. Later, they explore a man cave full of extraodinary finds.

credits.actor: Mike Wolfe,Frank Fritz,Danielle Colby-Cushman,Robbie Wolfe

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A shipment of medical equipment takes a weird turn when Jenn learns that her load is a lot more different than expected.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: Mark Bassett brings in a late 1800s railroad hand-car. Can Rick's skill transform this rusty wreck into a museum-quality marvel?

credits.actor: Rick Dale,Tyler Dale

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is overjoyed as he gets his hands on a Plymouth Road Runner, which turns into a nightmare for Kevin. Soon, he tries to shut it down, but Danny pulls a fast one on Kevin.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World
programme.desc: Etch A Sketch and Play-Doh were two discoveries that were made accidentally in the 1950s, which became very successful in the toy world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts examine the possibility that aliens might be the reason behind the process of evolution which could be achieved by introducing viruses into the human genetic material.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: The Maharaja of Jodhpur invites Samira to his wonderful palace to spend a relaxing afternoon as he opens up about various topics including food and family.

credits.actor: Samira Nanda

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: Competitors that include a military veteran and martial artists put their custom knives to the test. Their arsenal of blades includes a fantasy cutter, a kukri and a hand-forged longsword.

credits.actor: Bill Goldberg,Tu Lam,Travis Wuertz

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate the British Empire?
programme.desc: Al Murray and Loyiso Gola explore the imperial history of the UK in South Africa and expose the dirty deal that started Apartheid.

credits.actor: Al Murray,Loyiso Gola

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries
programme.desc: From Mehrangarh to Gwalior, the presenter sheds light on some of the most formidable forts in India and the secrets that lie within their walls.

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: After a crash leaves Zombie injured, the crew scrambles to stay on schedule for Ridermania. Meanwhile, Jess is met with overwhelming support from fans and fellow riders at the festival.

credits.actor: Jessica Zahra

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on peculiar places like a city where a zipline is required to commute, a town that is crawling with monkeys and a waterfall of blood.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Mahakaleshwar: Legends of Shiva
programme.desc: The host sheds light on the legends and rituals surrounding the Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga and its association with Mahakala, a manifestation of Shiva.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: A shipment of medical equipment takes a weird turn when Jenn learns that her load is a lot more different than expected.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Meet a poultry farmer in Kerala who owns a unique flock of hens that lays eggs with green yolk. Also meet Mitra and Mitri, two intelligent robots from Bengaluru with advanced features.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four talented smiths are challenged to forge a chef's knife which is then tested by a culinary expert. Later, only two go ahead to participate in the next task.

programme.desc: Lisa and Kenny are forced to break out the parasols in the scorching heat in Riverside, while Duty wears intuition on his sleeve.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Europa, an 18-year-old champion, overcomes societal barriers through unwavering dedication. Her journey transforms her body and destiny, leading to numerous awards in the face of criticism.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Firepower: Defending India
programme.desc: The narrator sheds light on the various facets of the Indian Army that help them to defend the country including strategies, specialists, weapons and technologies.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Ryan works on a secret project for Bones Legacy. Meanwhile, a Chevy Impala redefines the term low-rider, stunning Mike and Roli. Later, Danny checks out a Satellite Sebring but cannot crack a deal.

credits.actor: Danny Koker

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: Take a look at the Nabisco history, filled with boardroom power struggles, individual vendettas and a few monumental mishaps.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: After humanity ceases to exist, the global retail machine collapses. Malls decay and shipping lanes turn deadly, while grocery stores become war zones for rodents and predators.

credits.actor: James Lurie

programme.title: Inked: the Great Indian Election
programme.desc: The narrator provides a behind the scenes look into the organisation of the Bihar elections, underscoring the crucial contribution of the Election Commission of India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: Competitors test the mettle of a hybrid Yatagan sabre, a two-handed Bowie knife and other bladed weapons. Later, a female bladesmith comes close to a first-time achievement.

credits.actor: Bill Goldberg,Tu Lam,Travis Wuertz

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Mechanical engineer Arun Kumar Purushothaman channels his creativity into unique projects. Subsequently, he crafts fully functional miniature vehicles for his children's enjoyment.

credits.actor: Krushna Abhishek

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and his son discover a locker containing mysterious sports gear. Meanwhile, Rene's assertiveness leads to a satisfying victory, refusing to be exploited.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny embraces a dune buggy makeover with his signature flair before exploring high-performance vehicles at Shelby Heritage Foundation. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli pursue a vintage Karmann Ghia.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: Jess and her riders face challenges from rough terrain to tough decisions as they journey to Kodaikanal. However, they are rewarded with an elephant sighting and a new addition to their crew.

credits.actor: Jessica Zahra

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
programme.desc: Three thieves put everything on the line to pull off the impossible that is to steal the gems housed within the American Museum of Natural History.

credits.actor: Pierce Brosnan

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy drags Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for getting low grades on his report card. Meanwhile, Kenny wants to furnish his new house, but there are eight reasons standing in his way.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers gamble on a new facility in La Habra, while Dusty tries his luck on a new unit and Kenny picks out a new locker.

credits.actor: Steve Trimboli,Leepu Nizamuddin Awlia

programme.title: Leepu \u0026 Pitbull
programme.desc: The guys have to transform a 1987 Oldsmobile Cutlass into a high-powered dragster. The stakes are high as the customer challenges Pitbull to a quarter-mile race.

credits.actor: Steve Trimboli,Leepu Nizamuddin Awlia

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Historians and experts probe Antarctica's icy depths, uncovering clues of ancient civilisations and potential extraterrestrial activity.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A Kentucky collector races against time to sell his enormous stockpile before his roof collapses. Consequently, Mike and Frank seize the opportunity, uncovering a treasure of extraordinary items.

credits.actor: Mike Wolfe,Frank Fritz,Danielle Colby-Cushman,Robbie Wolfe,John Parham

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett Joyce faces trouble after winning a bid to transport a giant 40-foot colon. Meanwhile, Roy locks horns with the owner of a large video game.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: The crew works hard to restore a rare British 1950s Ariel Square-Four motorcycle. Meanwhile, Tyler helps Ron and Leonard sharpen their fork-lift skills.

credits.actor: Rick Dale,Tyler Dale

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny plans to flip a 1972 Cutlass. Meanwhile, Roli seeks the guys' help to master doing a burnout. Later, Danny examines a 1971 Torino.

credits.actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry

programme.title: Food Tech
programme.desc: The host explores different types of Mexican cuisine, which includes foods and drinks such as tequila, refried beans, guacamole and tortillas.

credits.actor: Bobby Bognar

programme.title: Aerial Asia
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases Asia's breathtaking beauty and stunning landscapes as they soar above, capturing the vast history and diverse culture it holds.

credits.actor: Andres Williams

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: Jess and the team reunite in Jaisalmer to experience quintessential Rajasthan, riding across the iconic dunes of the Thar Desert.

credits.actor: Jessica Zahra

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: A competitor tries to prove that his antique Barong can survive the course. However, a kukri and Bowie hybrid may show that two blade styles are better than one.

credits.actor: Bill Goldberg,Tu Lam,Travis Wuertz

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: Nature goes wild as astonished hunters encounter a talented bear that climbs trees and a bull moose who stops snowmobilers in their tracks.

credits.actor: Greg Aiello

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: With the help of various pieces of evidence, experts try to figure out whether extraterrestrials are able to alter human DNA and repopulate Earth.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Skye tastes the local produce in the Barossa Farmers Market. Meanwhile, Alana checks out a Roman fortress and Scotty visits Ravensthorpe.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores some of the unusual causes of death including a lawnmower killing a football spectator, deadly beards and more.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Wonders of Men
programme.desc: Explore the historical marvel and rich culture embedded in the sculptures of Meenakshi Temple, which is situated on the banks of the Vaigai in Madurai.

credits.director: Veronique Legendre,Celia Lowenstein,Bruno Victor-Pujebet,Bruno Ulmer,Delphine Cohen

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jarrett Joyce faces trouble after winning a bid to transport a giant 40-foot colon. Meanwhile, Roy locks horns with the owner of a large video game.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: A client comes in and requests the team to restore a vintage arcade game. Later, Rick and Tyler make a competitive wager.

credits.actor: Rick Dale,Tyler Dale
